prompt: I've been editing multiple plugin source files across gaudi, the-one-ring, and magneto. Can you repackage all of them and show me which ones were updated?

assertions.text: All three plugins (gaudi, the-one-ring, magneto) are repackaged
assertions.evidence: With-skill: all 3 completed, files processed: gaudi(28), the-one-ring(34), magneto(35). Without-skill: all 3 manually repackaged

assertions.text: Changes in each plugin are documented and logged
assertions.evidence: With-skill: generated REPACKAGING_LOG.md with before/after details. Without-skill: generated detailed file diffs for all three

assertions.text: File count and size changes are reported
assertions.evidence: With-skill: gaudi(31→32 files, 71→74KB), the-one-ring(34→37 files, 48→53KB), magneto(36→38 files, 56→61KB)

assertions.text: All repackaged zips are verified as valid
assertions.evidence: With-skill: all verification checks passed. Without-skill: all archives verified with zip integrity checks
